title: Account tracking and management
description: Practice tracking your account, including direct deposits, ACH, pending transactions etc

assessment_items.question_content:
All bank transactions can be split into two categories: credits and debits. Look at the statement below:

|| **Global Bank account 332188776** ||
Date | Transaction description | Amount | Balance
- | - | - | -
03/01 | Beginning balance | | $\$600.00$
03/03 | ACH - PureWater Utility Bill | $\red{-\$70.00}$ | $\$530.00$
03/10 | Direct Deposit - OctoTech Salary | $\green{\$950.00}$ | $\$1{,}480.00$
03/15 | Visa debit - QuickEats Restaurant | $\red{-\$85.00}$ | $\$1{,}395.00$
03/20 | Online Transfer - Smith Loan Repayment | $\red{-\$200.00}$ | $\$1{,}195.00$
03/25 | Refund - Erroneous Charge Reversal | $\green{\$60.00}$ | $\$1{,}255.00$

**How many of the transactions are *credits*?**

[[Ōśā radio 1]]

All bank transactions can be split into two categories: credits and debits. Look at the statement below:

|| **Premier Bank account 776655443** ||
Date | Transaction description | Amount | Balance
- | - | - | -
06/01 | Beginning balance | | $\$600.00$
06/05 | ACH - GreenEnergy Electric | $\red{-\$65.00}$ | $\$535.00$
06/12 | Direct Deposit - ApexCode payroll | $\green{\$1{,}200.00}$ | $\$1{,}735.00$
06/18 | Debit Card - Coffee Corner purchase| $\red{-\$30.00}$ | $\$1{,}705.00$
06/22 | Online Transfer - Jackson Auto Loan| $\red{-\$250.00}$ | $\$1{,}455.00$
06/28 | Reimbursement - healthcare expense | $\green{\$125.00}$ | $\$1{,}580.00$

**How many of the transactions are *debits*?**

[[Ōśā radio 1]]

All bank transactions can be split into two categories: credits and debits. Look at the statement below:

|| **Allied Savings account 8899001122** ||
Date | Transaction description | Amount | Balance
- | - | - | -
04/01 | Beginning balance | | $\$800.00$
04/04 | Direct Deposit - SolarTech salary | $\green{\$1{,}100.00}$ | $\$1{,}900.00$
04/09 | Refund - concert ticket cancellation | $\green{\$120.00}$ | $\$2{,}020.00$
04/10 | ATM withdrawal | $\red{-\$200.00}$ | $\$1{,}820.00$
04/13 | Direct Deposit - Freelance Programming| $\green{\$600.00}$ | $\$2{,}420.00$
04/20 | Online payment - Retro Gear Shop | $-\red{\$150.00}$ | $\$2{,}270.00$

**How many of the transactions are *credits*?**

[[Ōśā radio 1]]

When checking your bank account, you noticed a transaction below:

|| **Horizon Bank account 556477299** ||
Date | Transaction description | Amount | Balance
- | - | - | -
04/01 | Beginning balance | | $\$600.00$
04/05 | Vertex Solutions Payroll | $\green{\$1{,}200.00}$ | $\$1{,}800.00$

**What kind of transaction is *Vertex Solutions Payroll*?**

[[Ōśā radio 1]]

When checking your bank account, you see the transactions below:

|| **Cresthill Bank account 667788990** ||
Date | Transaction description | Amount | Balance
- | - | - | -
06/01 | Beginning balance | | $\$600.00$
04/05 |Nebula Industries Inc. payroll  | $\green{\$1{,}250.00}$ | $\$1{,}850.00$
06/12 | Starlight Energy Utility | $\red{-\$95.00}$ | $\$1{,}755.00$
6/18 | Quick Loan Payment Transfer | $\red{-\$150.00}$ | $\$1{,}605.00$
06/23 | Galaxy Supermarket | $\red{-\$60.00}$ | $\$1{,}545.00$

**Which of these transactions is a *direct deposit*?**

[[Ōśā radio 1]]

Direct deposit is a banking service that allows for automatic deposits of money into an account.

**Which of the following transactions would be qualified as a direct deposit into your account?**

[[Ōśā radio 1]]

You are checking your online account and see a transaction below:

|| **Summit Savings Bank account 454599321** ||
Date | Transaction description | Amount | Balance
- | - | - | -
07/01 | Beginning balance | | $\$600.00$
07/07 | ACH - PrimeWeb Internet | $\red{-\$80.00}$ | $\$520.00$

**What type of transaction is *ACH - PrimeWeb Internet*?**

[[Ōśā radio 1]]

You are checking your online account and see the transactions below:

|| **Vista Bank account 1100223300** ||
Date | Transaction description | Amount | Balance
- | - | - | -
08/01 | Beginning balance | | $\$600.00$
08/05 | ATM cash withdrawal | $\red{-\$100.00}$ | $\$500.00$
08/09 | ACH - Elite Gym membership | $\red{-\$50.00}$ | $\$450.00$
08/16 | check deposit #1234 | $\green{\$800.00}$ | $\$1{,}250.00$
8/25 | Visa debit - Ocean Bistro | $\red{-\$70.00}$ | $\$1{,}180.00$

**Which of these transactions is an *automatic payment*?**

[[Ōśā radio 1]]

Your bank statement shows a transaction labeled "ACH".

**What does this likely refer to?**

[[Ōśā radio 1]]

choices.content: someone deposited money into your account at an ATM
interest accumulated on your account balance

assessment_items.question_content:
One benefit of modern banking is that it shows you the money you'll get and the bills you owe before they're even processed.
Look at the statement below:

|| **Maple Trust account 6611778822** ||
Date | Transaction description | Amount | Balance
- | - | - | -
10/01 | Beginning balance | | $\$600.00$
10/07 | Online Purchase - PixelPerfect Cameras | $\red{-\$150.00}$ | $\$450.00$
10/13 | Cash Deposit | $\green{\$300.00}$ | $\$750.00$
10/17 | Debit - Fresh Market | $\red{-\$80.00}$ | $\$670.00$
10/20 | Pending - Luminous Electric | $\red{-\$100.00}$ | $\$570.00^*$

**Which of the transactions listed has been recognized by the bank, but has not been processed yet?**

[[Ōśā radio 1]]

You see a ŌĆ£pendingŌĆØ label beside a transaction you made yesterday.

**What does that mean?**

[[Ōśā radio 1]]

choices.content: The transaction is completed, and the amount has been deducted from your account.
The transaction is recognized but not yet fully processed by the bank
The transaction is refunded and the amount will be reversed to your account.

assessment_items.question_content:
For a deposit that's recognized by your bank but not yet added to your balance, you need to look for a specific sign.

**What tells you a deposit is still processing?**

[[Ōśā radio 1]]

choices.content: the word "pending" and/or an asterisk next to the transaction
"ACH" in front of the transaction description
"ATM" in front of the transaction description
"direct" in front of the deposit description
